mapper.sql: quest_id ,qna_id ,category_cd ,quest_st ,quest_st_dt ,title ,question ,quest_attachment_group_id ,questioner_id ,quest_created_dt ,quest_updated_dt ,answer ,answer_attachment_group_id ,answer_creator_id ,answer_created_dt ,answer_updater_id ,answer_updated_dt ,(select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = questioner_id) as questionerNm ,(select member_nm from cmmt_insider where member_id = answer_updater_id) as answererNm
mapper.select: /** CmmtQnaQuestDao.selectList_count */ select count(*) as cnt from cmmt_qna_quest where

/** CmmtQnaQuestDao.selectList */ select a.* ,#{totalItems} + 1 - (row_number() over(order by quest_created_dt desc, title asc)) as rn from cmmt_qna_quest a where
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}
